# Project conventions

<!-- Generated by transcend-harness v0.1.0. Keep this file under 200 lines: terse
     summaries here, full detail in .claude/rules/. Re-run /transcend-init to
     regenerate, or hand-edit freely — /transcend-audit preserves your edits. -->

Stack: **node-ts-react** (pnpm). This file is the map; the rules under
`.claude/rules/` hold the detail and load only when relevant files are touched.

## Architecture — Feature-sliced
Code lives under `src/features/<feature>`; cross-feature imports go through `src/shared`. Details: @.claude/rules/architecture.md

## Testing — Test-after
Run `pnpm test`. Cover behavior with tests before a change ships. Details: @.claude/rules/testing.md

## Git — GitHub flow
Branch per change; PR to `main`; direct push to `main` is not allowed. Details: @.claude/rules/git-workflow.md

## Review & quality — lint + typecheck, self-review
`pnpm run lint && pnpm run typecheck` before a PR. Details: @.claude/rules/quality-gates.md

## Context & handoff
Session handoffs live in `.claude/handoffs/`. Carve one module-scoped task per
session; start from the handoff's Context pointers rather than scanning the repo.
Run `/transcend-handoff` before stopping. Details: @.claude/rules/task-carving.md

@.claude/handoffs/current.md

## Specialized workflows
- Frontend/UX audit: invoke `impeccable` before merging UI changes.
- Visual regression: run `visual-regression` and attach diffs to the PR for UI changes.
